title: Steaming Techniques
description: Learn how to steam vegetables and proteins to retain nutrients and flavor.

steps.instruction: Fill a pot with water and bring it to a boil.
Place a steamer basket over the pot, ensuring it doesn't touch the water.
Add the ingredients to the steamer basket and cover with a lid.
Steam for the recommended time until tender.
Remove from heat and serve immediately.

safety_tips: Be cautious of steam when lifting the lid.
Use tongs to handle hot food from the steamer.
Ensure the pot is stable and won't tip over during steaming.
